title: dobinea vulgaris
intro: Dobinea vulgaris, also known as the Indian coral tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caesalpiniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dobinea vulgaris include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various ailments.
